title: AI Max Recovery Audit Output
description: Structured output from the AI Max Recovery Audit module. Designed to slot into SearchSavior's existing Supabase storage and dashboard components.

auditMetadata.description: Provenance and timing information about this audit run.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this audit was generated.

auditVersion.description: Semantic version of the audit module that produced this output, e.g. '0.1.0'.

fixtureName.description: Name of the input fixture or account this audit was run against.

accountName.description: Account name from campaign_config.json, useful for display.

hangoverScore.description: Composite indicator of how much AI Max behaviour persists in this account.

score.description: 0 = no hangover; 100 = severe hangover. Higher values indicate more persistent AI Max-trained behaviour.

category.description: Banded interpretation of score: none=0-15, mild=16-40, moderate=41-70, severe=71-100.

explanation.description: Human-readable summary of why this score was assigned. 1-3 sentences.

contributingFactors.description: Itemized factors that influenced the score, in descending order of impact.

factor.description: Short label of the factor, e.g. 'High proportion of competitor brand queries'.

weight.description: 0-1 relative weight of this factor in the composite score.

junkPatterns.description: Detected categories of junk traffic with aggregated metrics. Empty array if no patterns detected.

termCount.description: Number of distinct search terms in this category.

totalCost.description: Sum of cost across all terms in this category, in the account currency.

totalConversions.description: Sum of conversions across all terms in this category. Usually zero or near-zero for junk patterns.

exampleTerms.description: Up to 10 representative example terms from this category, for display.

recommendedNegatives.description: Ordered list of recommended negative keywords. Order is from highest impact (most cost saved) to lowest.

keyword.description: The negative keyword text. Do not include square brackets or quotes; just the raw term.

matchType.description: Recommended match type for the negative. Uppercase to match Google Ads API conventions.

reason.description: One-sentence justification for why this negative is recommended. Will be displayed to the user.

estimatedMonthlyWaste.description: Estimated wasted spend per month this negative would prevent, in the account currency.

sourceCategory.description: Which junk pattern category this negative addresses.

confidence.description: 0-1 confidence score for this recommendation. Used by the Confidence Engine for prioritization.

applicableCampaigns.description: Campaign IDs this negative should be added to. Empty array means account-level negative list.

smartBiddingDiagnostics.description: Observations about Smart Bidding behaviour and whether it is still chasing AI Max-trained patterns.

currentCpa.description: Current observed CPA across the audit window. Null if no conversions.

preAiMaxCpa.description: Reported pre-AI Max baseline CPA from campaign config. Null if AI Max never enabled or no baseline provided.

cpaInflationPct.description: Percentage difference between current and pre-AI Max CPA. Null if either value missing.

cpcDistributionShift.description: Direction of CPC distribution shift observed across the audit window.

observations.description: Free-form observations about the Smart Bidding behaviour. 2-5 sentences typical.

recoveryTimeline.description: Estimate of how long until CPA returns to pre-AI Max baseline after recommended negatives are applied.

estimatedWeeks.description: Estimated weeks to recovery. 0 means already recovered or AI Max never enabled.

explanation.description: Human-readable explanation of the timeline. 1-3 sentences.
